title: 4K ready HDMI lead with Ethernet | 1.5m
features: Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD Lossless sound support
High speed HDMI ideal for 4K ultra HD video transmission (up to 3840 x 2160p)
description: Product Description HDMI Cable 1.5m by AV:Link - A Better Viewing Experience Have you just purchased that expensive, 4K resolution television, with all the fancy applications and crystal-clear display? Expecting to be blown away? But when you turn it on, it looks...exactly like your old TV and video games...BUMMER! With our AV:Link, 4K ready HDMI cables, you will experience a crystal clear viewing experience every time! Our HDMI cables support Ultra HD video transmission, up to 3840 x 2160p. Gold plated connectors, oxygen-free copper conductor, and a full shield design to ensure there is no loss of signal transmission. Compatible With: 4K/HD TVs, Xbox 360, Xbox One, PS3, PS4, Apple TV, TV Receiver, Computer, Blu Ray, Roku, and many, many more! - Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD Lossless sound - Rich Video Quality: 4K Video - Durable & Long Lasting - High-Quality Build: Gold Plated Connectors & Oxygen Free Copper Conductor HDMI cables manufactured with high-quality materials, ensuring beautiful, crisp video quality. Box Contains 1 x HDMI Cable (Plug to Plug)
